purpose: The duplicate-name annotation arm (adjudication-batch B3, kept-as-pinned): clause_lower_mean registers first, then clause_lower_mean_shadow — a DISTINCT callable whose __name__ is also 'clause_lower_mean' (the registry's shadow mechanism exists for exactly this) — and the rule head naming clause_lower_mean derives the SHADOW's constant [0.5, 0.75], not the mean's [0.25, 1]: the pinned annotate match loop has no break, every same-named registrand runs, and the LAST registration's result wins (interpretation.py:1919-1930). The head-fn twin case pins the opposite (first-wins) resolution.
provenance: docs/ledger/phase3-adjudication-batch.md B3 ('No committed case registers duplicate names; seam-level only' — until session 29); interpretation.py:1919-1930 at the pin; reference fns harness/reference_fns.py clause_lower_mean + clause_lower_mean_shadow; screened live 2026-07-12 (screen_pin_arms.py ann-dup, bound [0.5,1.0]-shape confirmed cross-engine with a distinct twin)
